items.title: Rwandan singer dies as he was being released from prison
items.dek: The former university lecturer was a vocal critic of the government and ruling Rwandan Patriotic Front party.

items.title: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
items.dek: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
items.body: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
